narrative:
Liberty Township has 1,673 registered voters, with 49.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.0 percentage points.
